title: Amazon’s €15b France Plan Reshapes Logistics AI And ESG Story
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) is committing €15b to expand its operations in France, its largest investment in Europe to date. The plan includes new distribution centers, AI driven logistics upgrades, and thousands of logistics and tech roles across the country. The program also covers worker upskilling initiatives and support for Amazon's net zero carbon target by 2040. The investment strengthens local infrastructure for e commerce, cloud, and AI related services across the French...
